nodes.title: Note: Model link
widgets_values:
Guide: [Subgraph](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph)

## Model Links (for Local Users)

**vae**

- [flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)

**diffusion_models**

- [ideogram4_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Ideogram-4/resolve/main/diffusion_models/ideogram4_fp8_scaled.safetensors)
- [ideogram4_unconditional_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Ideogram-4/resolve/main/diffusion_models/ideogram4_unconditional_fp8_scaled.safetensors)

**text_encoders**

- [qwen3vl_8b_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen3-VL/resolve/main/text_encoders/qwen3vl_8b_fp8_scaled.safetensors)
- [gemma4_e4b_it_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/gemma-4/resolve/main/text_encoders/gemma4_e4b_it_fp8_scaled.safetensors)


## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │   └── flux2-vae.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   ├── ideogram4_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│   │   └── ideogram4_unconditional_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│   └── 📂 text_encoders/
│       ├── qwen3vl_8b_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│       └── gemma4_e4b_it_fp8_scaled.safetensors
```

## Report Issue

Note: Please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud updates follow stable releases, so some nightly-supported models may not be available yet.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

nodes.title: Note: Ideogram 4.0
widgets_values:
### About the model

The model is trained on **structured JSON captions** (scene summary, style block, background, and optional per-object descriptions with bounding boxes and hex color palettes). Official inference validates prompts against that schema. Guidance uses **flow-matching** with **asymmetric classifier-free guidance** (the unconditional pass drops text tokens)—not a separate negative prompt string.

**NOTE: If you see "Image blocked by safety filter" it is because of safety training in the model itself, ComfyUI does not have any safety filter.**
---

### How to build prompts here

**(a) Raw input**: Paste or type directly into the subgraph. You may use plain natural language, but **structured JSON** (as in the subgraph default) gives the most predictable layout and style control.

**(b) Model-assisted (LLM):** Use the **Ideogram4 Caption Prompt Template** output with any LLM tools to obtain the JSON format prompt

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: {"high_level_description":"An eye-level photograph of a city park, with paved pathways curving between manicured lawns and rows of trees, distant figures in fitted iridescent body suits with full face coverings walking and sitting along the paths under soft overcast daylight, smooth futuristic benches and lighting fixtures lining the walkway, shot on Kodak Ektar 100.","style_description":{"aesthetics":"Urban documentary, cool-toned futurism, fine grain, soft contrast.","lighting":"Natural available light under even overcast sky, producing soft diffused illumination with minimal shadow contrast. Light falls evenly across the lawn and pathway surfaces with a low fill ratio, creating gentle gradient shading on rounded park structures. Subtle cool cast from the sky balances against warm reflected tones from the iridescent suits.","photo":"35mm prime lens, f/5.6, 1/250s. Kodak Ektar 100 film stock, fine grain, rich natural color saturation with warm-neutral rendering in foreground textures and cool tonal shift in distant haze. Focus plane set on the paved pathway and nearest foliage approximately 2 meters from camera; mid-ground figures and background trees fall into moderate depth-of-field softness.","medium":"photograph","color_palette":["#3A5A6C","#6E8A95","#A8BEC4","#D6E2E0","#4F6B4A","#7C9A6E","#B8CBA8","#2E2E36","#5C6470","#8C9AA6","#C9A6D1","#7AA6C9","#E8E0D6","#1E2A2E","#3E5C5C","#A0B8B0"]},"compositional_deconstruction":{"background":"Open city park under a flat, even overcast sky, soft pale gray-blue with no visible sun position. A paved walkway in light gray composite material curves from the lower foreground toward the mid-distance, bordered by closely cut lawn in muted green tones. Rows of slender trees with rounded canopies line both sides of the path, their leaves rendered in soft, slightly desaturated greens due to the overcast light. Smooth, low-profile park benches and slim freestanding light fixtures in matte white and pale gray are spaced along the walkway edge. In the distance, the tops of sleek glass-and-metal buildings rise above the treeline, softened by atmospheric haze that reduces contrast and saturation with depth. The pathway surface shows a faint damp sheen, reflecting soft highlights from the sky. Kodak Ektar 100 fine grain and warm-neutral tonal rendering present throughout, with the iridescent surfaces of distant figures providing the most saturated color accents in the frame.","elements":[{"type":"obj","bbox":[600,0,1000,1000],"desc":"Paved pathway in light gray composite material occupying the lower half of the frame, surface slightly textured with fine aggregate, carrying a faint damp sheen that reflects soft overcast light. The path curves gently from the bottom edge toward the upper-right mid-ground, in sharp focus near the camera and softening slightly with distance."},{"type":"obj","bbox":[450,0,650,350],"desc":"Manicured lawn bordering the left side of the pathway, short-cut grass in a muted sage green, with a slight textural variation from mowing patterns. Surface lit evenly by diffused overcast light, rendered with natural color saturation typical of Ektar 100."},{"type":"obj","bbox":[300,600,650,1000],"desc":"Manicured lawn bordering the right side of the pathway, matching muted green tone, transitioning into a row of trees further back. A single smooth white park bench with a curved backrest sits at the lawn's edge, unoccupied, its surface catching soft even light."},{"type":"obj","bbox":[100,0,500,1000],"desc":"Row of slender trees with rounded, dense canopies lining both sides of the pathway, leaves in soft desaturated green with subtle yellow undertones from the overcast light. Trunks are smooth and pale gray-brown, partially obscured by low hanging foliage. Foliage edges soften into background bokeh with increasing distance."},{"type":"obj","bbox":[500,350,650,600],"desc":"A slim freestanding light fixture in matte white, cylindrical with a softly glowing horizontal band near its top, positioned at the edge of the pathway. Surface is smooth with a faint reflective sheen, rendered in sharp focus in the near mid-ground."},{"type":"obj","bbox":[480,300,620,750],"desc":"A loose cluster of figures in fitted iridescent body suits with full face coverings, walking along the pathway in the mid-ground. The suits shift between teal, violet, and silver tones depending on the angle of diffused light, with smooth seamless fabric covering the entire body and head, no visible facial features. Figures are rendered as soft humanoid forms with legible color shifts but reduced edge sharpness, consistent with moderate depth-of-field falloff."},{"type":"obj","bbox":[520,650,640,850],"desc":"A single seated figure in a fitted iridescent body suit with full face covering, resting on a smooth white park bench further down the pathway. The suit's surface shows a shift from silver to pale violet across its curved form, reflecting the overcast sky. Rendered with soft focus consistent with its mid-ground distance from camera."},{"type":"obj","bbox":[0,200,300,800],"desc":"Distant skyline of sleek glass-and-metal buildings rising above the treeline, surfaces reflecting the pale overcast sky in cool blue-gray tones. Forms are softened by atmospheric haze, reducing contrast and saturation, with only general geometric outlines legible."}]}}
